status: exact finite realized L5-L8 x-axis old-secant/site-word audit and actual selected-child recurrence census; not a universal tail quotient, policy cycle, contraction lemma, or availability proof

canonical_artifact.normalization: parse JSON, remove resource_policy.elapsed_seconds, then serialize with sorted keys and separators (comma, colon)
canonical_artifact.determinism_check: the two parsed artifacts differ only in resource_policy.elapsed_seconds (171.179 versus 170.827); their normalized byte streams are identical

scope.covered_channel: candidate interior site on an already active x-parallel secant through two actual completed-level points
scope.selected_descendants: all actual recorded child slots from every strict-effect seed through L8, including zero-effect intermediate lineage states

closed_selected_lineage_graph.consequence: current zero poison is not an irrelevance certificate: 35 exact selected transitions reactivate a latent zero-effect x-line

short_actual_control_returns.physical_deduplication: strip the stitch-order prefix from the same source and target level/gap/line descendant path; every class contains exactly one gate record and one pipeline record
short_actual_control_returns.interpretation: the exact effect key is parent step, relative lateral coordinate, ordered strict site-offset tuple, and its deterministic killed-word mask; the six action returns also repeat the recorded selected connector word. These are exact finite projected cycles, not a proof that source and target have congruent infinite futures.

selected_slot_phase_test.consequence: the tested finite key of stitch order, source step, selected word, child slot, prefix control, and child step is not a transition congruence on this frozen lineage graph

proved_finite_facts: the listed x-parallel lines, prefix activations, exact site masks, selected descendant transitions, latent states, and returns of length at most three are exhaustive for the pinned L5-L8 artifacts and the two named schedules
a strict residual DAG rank on the tested effect key is impossible because exact effect-key returns occur
adjoining the recorded selected action still does not remove every witnessed period-three return
forgetting a line whenever its current poison mask is empty is unsound on the recorded lineage
not_proved: a universal transition quotient over alternate connector histories
an infinite realized policy cycle or a connector jam
period four or any L9-and-later recurrence statement
any result for non-x-parallel secants, old endpoints on candidate-internal lines, or the union with other poison channels
connector availability or an unconditional theorem
proof_assessment.architectural_consequence: the x-resonant block must be promoted with additional honest lineage/phase information or controlled by a non-strict contraction; step, offset, exact x-poison mask, and recorded action are not by themselves a strict finite rank
